pricing.heroSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your trading journey. Start free, upgrade anytime.
pricing.compareSubtitle: See exactly what's included in each plan.
pricing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about TradeAnchor pricing.
pricing.faq1Question: Is there a free trial for Pro or Premium?
pricing.faq1Answer: Yes! The Free tier gives you full access to core features with no time limit. You can upgrade to Pro or Premium at any time, and downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq2Question: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq2Answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express via our secure payment partner. PayPal is also supported. All transactions are encrypted and processed securely.
pricing.faq3Question: Can I change or cancel my plan anytime?
pricing.faq3Answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. When you downgrade, you retain access to premium features until the end of the current billing period.
pricing.faq4Answer: Yes, we offer prorated refunds within 7 days of subscription start. If you're not satisfied, contact us at support@mytradewiseoc.com for assistance.
pricing.faq5Answer: Yes. We use bank-level encryption (AES-256), comply with GDPR standards, and never share or sell your personal data or trading records. Your information stays private and protected.
pricing.ctaDescription: Start recording, analyzing, and improving your trading with TradeAnchor — free to begin, upgrade when you are ready.

hero.subtitle: TradeAnchor is a professional smart trading journal SaaS platform integrating trade record management, AI-powered data analysis, and community knowledge base — helping traders Record · Analyze · Grow.
hero.highlight1Desc: Auto-map CSV/Excel columns to TradeAnchor fields with custom mapping support.
hero.highlight2Desc: Browse, read, and publish posts in the community. Share insights and engage with fellow traders.
hero.highlight3Desc: Generate deep trading insights and pattern analysis with AI models.

features.sectionTitle: Everything You Need to Master Trading
features.sectionSubtitle: From trade recording to AI analysis — all in one powerful platform.
features.card1Desc: Log every detail of your trades including entry/exit prices, position direction, quantity, and P&L statistics.
features.card2Desc: Leverage multiple AI models to analyze your trading patterns, identify weaknesses, and get actionable suggestions.
features.card3Desc: Record your thoughts, emotions, and lessons learned after each trade or trading day for continuous improvement.
features.card4Desc: Earn credits through task achievements, climb the leaderboards, and make your trading journey more motivating.
features.card5Desc: See all your trading activity on an interactive calendar with color-coded profit/loss indicators per day.
features.card6Desc: Explore diverse community posts, read insights from fellow traders, or publish your own to share expertise.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro1: By accessing or using the TradeAnchor platform (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.intro2: TradeAnchor reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.account1: To access certain features, you must create an account with accurate, complete, and current information.
terms.account2: You are responsible for safeguarding your login credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms.account3: TradeAnchor reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.use1: You may not use the Service for any unlawful purpose, including but not limited to:
terms.use2: - Uploading malicious code or harmful content
terms.use3: - Attempting to gain unauthorized access to other users' accounts or systems
terms.use4: - Reverse engineering or decompiling the platform
terms.use5: - Using automated tools to scrape data without authorization
terms.content1: You retain ownership of content you submit (trading records, journal entries, strategies).
terms.content2: By publishing content on our Community Plaza, you grant TradeAnchor a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform.
terms.content3: Content must not infringe intellectual property rights or contain illegal material.
terms.marketplace1: TradeAnchor operates a Community Plaza ("Plaza") where users may publish and share trading insights, analysis, and related content with other users.
terms.marketplace2: All posts published on the Community Plaza are free. No payment or paid transactions are involved.
terms.marketplace3: Published content must be original or properly licensed. Users must not infringe third-party intellectual property rights.
terms.marketplace4: The platform reserves the right to review and manage content that violates our guidelines.
terms.marketplace5: Users are solely responsible for their published content. TradeAnchor shall not be liable for the accuracy or completeness of user-generated content.
terms.marketplace6: By publishing content on the Plaza, you acknowledge and agree to the above rules.
terms.subscription1: Paid subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis (monthly).
terms.subscription2: All payments are processed securely through a third-party payment platform as Merchant of Record.
terms.subscription3: Prices are subject to change; existing subscribers will be notified at least 30 days before price changes take effect.
terms.subscription4: Subscription benefits are non-transferable unless explicitly authorized by TradeAnchor.
terms.credits1: "Credits" are virtual reward units within the Platform, used exclusively for unlocking and consuming features and services on this website.
terms.credits2: Earning Credits: Users can earn credits by completing various tasks in the "Growth Plan" module, including but not limited to: first-time post browsing, creating trade records, publishing community posts, writing trading diaries, etc. Specific tasks and corresponding credit rewards are subject to real-time display on the Growth Plan page.
terms.credits3: Spending Credits: When using features such as AI report generation, AI follow-up conversations, or premium community content, credits will be deducted from your available balance according to the applicable rate. Exact consumption amounts are displayed at the time of each action.
terms.credits4: Credits cannot be withdrawn, transferred, gifted to third parties, or redeemed for any monetary value.
terms.credits5: Credits cannot be increased through top-up, purchase, or any payment method. All credits earned on this website are for consumption within this website only and may not be exchanged for cash or physical goods.
terms.credits6: The Platform reserves the right to adjust credit earning rules and consumption rates based on operational needs. Material changes will be communicated via in-app announcements or email in advance.
terms.credits7: If a user account is restricted or banned for violation of these Terms, any unspent credits in that account will be forfeited without restoration.
terms.disclaimer1: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
terms.disclaimer2: TradeAnchor does not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
terms.disclaimer3: Trading involves substantial risk. The AI analytics provided are for informational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice.
terms.termination1: TradeAnchor shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.termination2: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for your subscription in the preceding 12 months.
terms.changes1: We may revise these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified via email at least 14 days before they take effect.
terms.changes2: Your continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.contact1: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at: support@mytradewiseoc.com
terms.contact2: Mailing address will be provided upon request.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro1: TradeAnchor ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacy.intro2: By using TradeAnchor, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.
privacy.collect1: Account Information: Name, email address, country/region when you register an account.
privacy.collect2: Trading Data: Trade records, entry/exit prices, positions, quantities, and related notes that you input into the platform.
privacy.collect3: Usage Data: Pages visited, features used, time spent, device information, and browser type.
privacy.collect4: Payment Data: Payment processing is handled entirely by a third-party payment platform. We do not store credit card numbers or full payment details.
privacy.collect5: Cookies: We use session cookies to maintain your login state and functional cookies to remember preferences like language selection.
privacy.usage1: To provide and maintain the Service, process transactions, and send technical notices or updates.
privacy.usage2: To generate AI-powered trading analysis reports based on your submitted trade data.
privacy.usage3: To improve the quality of our services, develop new features, and fix bugs.
privacy.usage4: To respond to your comments, questions, requests, and provide customer support.
privacy.usage5: To detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security threats.
privacy.usage6: To comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service.
privacy.share1: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.share3: - Third-party Payment Platform: For payment processing only (card details never reach our servers)
privacy.share4: - Cloud Infrastructure Providers: AWS/GCP for hosting and data storage
privacy.share5: - AI API Providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google for processing AI report generation (trade data sent in encrypted form)
privacy.share6: Published post content on the Community Plaza is visible to other users according to your publication settings.
privacy.security1: We implement industry-standard security measures including AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit.
privacy.security2: All user passwords are hashed using bcrypt with salt before storage.
privacy.security3: Access to personal data is limited to authorized personnel who need it for their job function.
privacy.security4: We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments.
privacy.cookies1: We use the following types of cookies:
privacy.cookies2: Essential Cookies: Required for authentication and session management. Cannot be disabled.
privacy.cookies3: Preference Cookies: Remember your language choice, UI settings. Valid for 12 months.
privacy.cookies4: Analytics Cookies: Help us understand usage patterns. Can be opted out via browser settings.
privacy.rights1: Right to Access: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rights2: Right to Deletion: Request deletion of your account and all associated data, subject to legal retention requirements.
privacy.rights3: Right to Correction: Update inaccurate or incomplete personal information through Settings.
privacy.rights4: Right to Portability: Export your trade data and account data in standard formats.
privacy.rights5: Right to Withdraw Consent: Unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time.
privacy.rights6: To exercise these rights, contact us at support@mytradewiseoc.com.
privacy.retention1: We retain your data while your account is active.
privacy.retention2: After account deletion: trading records are permanently removed within 30 days; metadata for legal compliance is retained up to 3 years.
privacy.retention3: Payment records are retained as required by tax law (typically 7 years) and managed solely by the third-party payment platform.
privacy.children1: The Service is not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.
privacy.children2: If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it promptly.
privacy.contact1: For privacy inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer: support@mytradewiseoc.com
privacy.contact2: We aim to respond to all privacy-related requests within 30 business days.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.overview1: At TradeAnchor, we want you to be fully satisfied with our service. If you are not satisfied, we offer a straightforward refund policy outlined below.
refund.overview2: All refund requests must be made within 7 calendar days of your initial subscription purchase.
refund.eligibility1: You qualify for a refund if ALL of the following conditions are met:
refund.eligibility2: - The refund request is submitted within 7 days of subscription start date.
refund.eligibility3: - Your account has not been flagged for Terms of Service violations.
refund.eligibility4: - You have not previously requested a refund for the same subscription period.
refund.eligibility5: - No more than 10% of your monthly quota has been consumed (e.g., AI reports generated, trades imported beyond free tier limits).
refund.process1: Send your refund request to support@mytradewiseoc.com with:
refund.process5: 4. Order ID from your payment confirmation email (from the payment service provider)
refund.process6: We typically respond to refund requests within 48-72 business hours.
refund.prorated1: If your request is outside the 7-day window but within the current billing cycle, we offer prorated refunds based on unused time.
refund.prorated2: Prorated amount = (Unused days / Total billing days) × Subscription fee - Processing fee ($0.50 USD).
refund.prorated3: Processing fees apply to cover transaction costs charged by our payment provider.
refund.exceptions1: Refunds will NOT be granted if:
refund.exceptions2: - The request is submitted after the current billing cycle has ended.
refund.exceptions3: - The account was terminated due to violation of Terms of Service.
refund.exceptions4: - Usage significantly exceeded the free tier limits (indicating active benefit received).
refund.exceptions5: - Multiple accounts were created to abuse promotional offers.
refund.method1: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used for the purchase.
refund.method2: Processing time: 5-10 business days depending on your bank/card issuer.
refund.method3: The payment service provider handles the actual refund transaction; you will receive confirmation email once processed.
refund.timeframe3: Next cycle onward: Cancel auto-renewal instead (no refund available for past cycles).
refund.contact1: Questions about refunds? Reach us at: support@mytradewiseoc.com
refund.contact2: We value your trust and strive to resolve all refund requests fairly and promptly.
